title: Floppy Discs 3.5
description: Music discs now look more like the  3.5 inch floppy disks.
body: I did a thing now you can get the thing Replace your boring music pancakes with stylish 3.5 inches style floppy disks or rather... **FLOPPY DISCS** For a different flavour of floppy disks check out Floppy Music Disc by CountXD
